events.label: Hook — Devin on rooftop at dusk, city buildings behind

events.text: As of last week, Instagram dropped a [redacted] massive update.
From now on, every single one of your videos has potential to show up when someone searches on Google.

events.label: Dark-grey Google page with search pill typing 'how to go vi|'

events.text: But with 95 million posts going up on Instagram every day, your video will start to get buried if you don't start optimizing your caption for Google search and you need to do it fast.

events.label: Mock Google results with Reddit links + 'Short videos' embed of Devin reel + kayazlee TikTok
Indoor seated shot, city-window night view behind, tools composite overlay

events.text: So here are three steps to make sure that your video always pops up first.
So to start, you need to actually make sure that you have the Google setting turned on.

events.label: Three icons floating at chest level
iOS-style toggle off->on with glow + 'SECRET' caption

events.text: And then you want to make sure that this setting is turned on.
Then second, head over to the website, answer the public dot com.

events.label: Indoor shot with empty Google search pill overlay low on frame

events.description: Single-frame white flash + hard cut to AnswerThePublic landing

events.text: And then go ahead and search the topic of your video.
Now this will give you a wheel of the most popular searches for that topic.

events.highlighted_wedge: how to go viral on instagram

events.text: So all you have to do is choose the most popular one that best fits your video and then make that the first line of your caption.
And then third, click on the search that you chose and then scroll down to find the people also searched section.

events.label: Dark-glass IG-style card with 4 candidate searches, yellow-bolded keywords

events.text: And then what you want to do for the rest of your caption is copy these search terms over and then try to best create a summary of your video with these search terms.

events.label: Expanded caption with bolded keywords + teal #instagram hashtag

events.text: And then once you're done, throw in a couple of hashtags and now your video is perfectly...

events.label: Outdoor reprise shot — Devin hands-up + 'BECAUSE' caption

style_summary.concept: platform-SEO tutorial with real app captures
signature_elements: heavy ghost/motion-blur glitch transitions at major cuts
flash-cut pair (single-frame white) for mid-section scene cut
flat-red (not gradient) accent on emphasis caption second line
real platform screenshots rather than mocks
iOS-style toggle animation for settings demos
fake IG caption card with yellow-bolded keyword annotation
tools-preview icon float (same pattern as Devin 1)
style_summary.caption_philosophy: Reserved for narrative pivots only (~4 captions in 74s). Still sparse, NOT Submagic word-by-word.
